title: Scale of operations
summary: 9609 A Level — economies and diseconomies of scale.

simpleExplanation.title: Bigger isn't always better
simpleExplanation.summary: Growing output can cut unit costs through economies of scale, but excessive size may create coordination problems.

sections.content: **Scale** (9.1.2) links **9708 7.5 economies of scale** to **operations strategy**.

sections.label: Mark a scale of operations question
